description: PLMKR Data and analytics knowledge base — load order for knowledge assembly

files.description: Analyst identity, mission (decision-grade truth per data point), jurisdiction (owns/does-not-own), six philosophy principles, decision style and biases, communication style, hard refusals

Forecasting methodology (baseline-first, decompose, outside-view, bands-not-points, assumption register, falsifiability), named frameworks, band-width honesty rule, specificity gate; release-performance projection, decay-curve and rented-audience discipline, 7-day window, territory release dynamics, domain anti-patterns

Cohort design and denominator discipline, retention-curve reads, cohort floors (100/500); DSP metrics (save rate, skip/completion, listener-to-stream, source mix), playlist dynamics, per-platform DSP reporting quirks, domain anti-patterns

Anomaly logic (expected range, typology, triage order, absence anomalies), statistical frameworks (SPC, z-score, IQR, seasonal decomposition), 8-period attention threshold and escalation; stream-spike forensics, artificial-streaming bar, territory anomaly patterns, DSP reporting lag

Comparison-set reasoning, reference-class checks (survivor/selection/era/N), comparable-case minimums by stakes, recency-vs-similarity; chart mechanics per market, market-research source trust tiers, global market analytics, reference-class hygiene

Three-band scoring architecture — MEASURED / CHECKED / JUDGED; six judged dimensions (C1-C6), closed verdict scale, score anchors, confidence and uncertainty propagation, composite-deferral with unlock condition, pre-score narrative mode

Mandatory core (work product, decision summary, confidence), conditional-module matrix, four deliverable templates (Release Performance Read, Anomaly Investigation, Forecast Memo, Benchmark Comparison), handoff boundaries, escalation flags, hard refusals

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, sibling products, or entity names from any source material.
notes.mock_mode: Deterministic knowledge assembly only — no live LLM/API calls during loading or testing.
